title: Odd Lots: How Baltimore Is Fighting Vacant Housing (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的地段：巴尔的摩如何应对空置住房问题（播客）
summary: Since Mayor Brandon Scott took office in 2020, he has fixated on a very visible problem in Baltimore: the tens of thousands of vacant homes that dot the city. It’s hard to build new houses when there are so many that sit empty and unused. And the process of tracking down owners, convincing them to sell their vacant properties, and then converting those homes into usable housing supply is a tall task. But in the last few years, the number of vacant homes in Baltimore has dropped from 16,000 to ju

title: US to Guide Trapped Ships Through Hormuz; Oil Steadies | Horizons Middle East & Africa 4/5/2026

summary: US President Donald Trump says the US will begin guiding some neutral ships trapped in the Persian Gulf out through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday. Also on the show: Dubai International Airport reported a 66% drop in passenger numbers in March; OPEC+ agrees modest quota hike after UAE exit; Senegal’s Faye says party at risk as tensions simmer with Sonko; GameStop pitches $56 billion takeover of eBay. Guests include: Deepak Mehra, Commercial Bank of Dubai Chief Economist, Paul Griffiths, Dubai Airports CEO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US to Guide Ships Through Hormuz & US-EU Tariffs Dispute | Daybreak Europe 05/04/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将引导船舶穿越霍尔木兹海峡和美欧关税争端欧洲黎明 05/04/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, President Trump says the US will begin guiding trapped ships through the Strait of Hormuz, and the US will respond with force is there is interference. US Central Command says it will provide military support, including the use of guided-missile destroyers and drones.

China has ordered companies not to comply with US sanctions on five domestic refiners linked to the Iranian oil trade.

And EU leaders are meeting after Donald Trump threatened to raise tariffs on EU-made vehicles to 25%, in an escalation of the tariff dispute.

Today's guest: Elias Haddad, Brown Brothers Harriman, Vice President & Global Head of Markets Strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Griffiths: Transfers to Lead Dubai Airport Recovery
title_cn: 格里菲斯：调动领导迪拜机场恢复
summary: Dubai Airports is scaling up flight movements after months of disruption caused by conflict in the Middle East. Passenger traffic in the first quarter declined more than 20% compared to the same period last year reflecting the impact of regional airspace turmoil. CEO Paul Griffiths told Joumanna Bercetche on Horizons Middle East and Africa that the airport will ramp up operations in the coming months, with transfer passengers helping drive the recovery. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is Hantavirus and How Did It Kill Cruise Ship Passengers?
title_cn: 什么是汉坦病毒以及它如何杀死游轮乘客？
summary: A cluster of hantavirus infections linked to a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean has left three people dead and several others seriously ill, prompting an alert from the World Health Organization and raising questions about how a rare rodent-borne disease might spread in such an unusual setting.

title: Montenegro Says EU Working to Fix Euro Issue Hindering Accession
title_cn: 黑山称欧盟正在努力解决阻碍入盟的欧元问题
summary: The European Union is working on resolving the thorny issue of Montenegro’s unilateral use of the euro, an obstacle for the Adriatic nation’s plans to join the bloc, Finance Minister Novica Vukovic said.

title: Quant Fund Sees Hungary Finance Revival as Orban Era Is Ending
title_cn: 量化基金认为随着欧尔班时代的结束，匈牙利金融将复苏
summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s defeat at the ballot box unleashed a wave of enthusiasm over potential opportunities in Hungary’s financial sector. A small quant shop with plans to expand in Budapest is adding to the chorus of voices expecting a revival.

summary: Australia’s stock exchange operator warned businesses not to exaggerate the impact of artificial intelligence on their operations, saying it monitors the market for instances of so-called ‘ramping’ up of share prices.

title_cn: 英伟达进军物理人工智能领域引发亚洲合作伙伴反弹
summary: The list of Asian stocks that benefit from business partnership with Nvidia Corp. is getting longer, as the region further integrates into the AI chip giant’s business ecosystem.

title: Russian to Plead Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Hack
title_cn: 俄罗斯承认石油和天然气设施黑客攻击罪
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries will plead guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison, according to federal filings and his lawyer.

title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
title_cn: 演员本·麦肯齐 (Ben McKenzie) 在《医生》中探索加密货币欺诈。
summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Vibe Coding Isn’t the End of the Software Engineer
title_cn: 为什么 Vibe 编码不是软件工程师的终结
summary: Generative AI has turned coding from a specialized skill into something anyone can do with a simple prompt. A warehouse owner is revolutionizing his shipping software with AI and a creative designer vibe coded  her first app with zero technical experience. Computer programmers are doing it too, but a director at Google Cloud AI says vibe coding does not mean the end of serious engineering. As professionals and hobbyists alike are writing code with AI, hiring for junior developers is falling fast and researchers warn companies are making a dangerous short-term bet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside the Booming Market for Dinosaur Fossils | Odd Lots
title_cn: 恐龙化石蓬勃发展的市场内部零股
summary: Two years ago, Citadel's Ken Griffin paid almost $45 million for a stegosaurus skeleton, making it the most expensive fossil ever sold at auction. So why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires instead of museums? How does the private market for fossils actually work? And how similar is it to the market for art and other antiquities? In this episode, we speak with Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron, where he is the gallery's in-house broker for dinosaur fossils. We talk about how fossils are found and priced, what it's like to work alongside dinosaur hunters, how his gallery identifies potential buyers, and why Joe thinks something about the birds-to-dinosaurs evolutionary pipeline is off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Court Rules Firms Can’t Lay Off Workers on AI Grounds
title_cn: 中国法院裁定企业不得以人工智能为由解雇员工
summary: A Chinese court ruled that companies cannot terminate employees just to replace them with artificial intelligence systems, as authorities juggle the need to stabilize the domestic labor market with a global race to develop AI technologies.

title: NATO Chief Says US Disappointed in Europe Over Iran Response
title_cn: 北约秘书长表示美国对欧洲对伊朗的反应感到失望
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte warned European leaders that US President Donald Trump is disappointed with their reluctance to assist with the war in Iran.

title: Singapore and New Zealand Sign Essential Supply Trade Pact
title_cn: 新加坡和新西兰签署基本供应贸易协定
summary: Singapore and New Zealand signed a deal Monday to strengthen supply chain resilience and safeguard the flow of critical goods such as food and energy, as both countries seek to shield their trade-dependent economies against disruptions from the war in Iran.

title: Drone Hits Upscale Moscow Tower as City Readies for WWII Parade
title_cn: 无人机袭击莫斯科高档塔楼，城市正准备参加二战阅兵
summary: A drone hit a residential tower in an upscale Moscow district in a rare strike near the city center ahead of the traditional World War II Victory Day parade.

title: Indian States Begin Counting Votes in Key Elections
title_cn: 印度各邦开始在关键选举中计票
summary: Vote counting is underway following polls across key regions in India. West Bengal is emerging as the main battleground and the outcome will test Prime Minister Modi's ability to expand beyond the core BJP base. Bloomberg's Sudhi Ranjan Sen reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: President Donald Trump has said the US will begin guiding some neutral ships trapped in the Persian Gulf out through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday. Bloomberg TV's Joumanna Bercetche hosts Deputy Bureau Chief Abeer Abu Omar who breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-Taiwan Lawmaker warns of China’s 'Dangerous' Strategy
title_cn: 前台湾立法委员警告中国的“危险”战略
summary:
Jason Hsu, Senior Fellow at Hudson Institute and a former KMT party lawmaker in Taiwan, says Beijing is using a two-pronged approach on Taiwan. He also discusses concerns over the self-ruled island being "on the menu" of expected talks between Presidents Xi and Trump later this month. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: N Korean Women’s Soccer Team Plan First Game in South Since 2014
title_cn: 朝鲜女足计划自2014年以来首次在韩国举行比赛
summary: A North Korean women’s football team is set to visit South Korea this month for an Asian Football Confederation Women’s Champions League semi-final, marking a rare instance of cross-border engagement even as diplomatic ties between the two Koreas remain frozen.

title: European Leaders Meet as Trump Adds More Threats: What to Watch
title_cn: 特朗普增加更多威胁之际欧洲领导人会面：看点
summary: Nearly 50 European leaders will gather in Armenia Monday to discuss pressing issues for the continent, such as democratic resilience and energy security. But the meeting will likely be overshadowed by recent comments by Donald Trump that threaten to send transatlantic relations to a new low.

title: Trump Says US to Start Guiding Trapped Ships Through Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将开始引导被困船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: President Donald Trump said the US will begin guiding some neutral ships trapped in the Persian Gulf out through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday.

title: Former NYC Mayor Giuliani in Critical Condition, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称前纽约市市长朱利安尼病情危急
summary: Former New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani has been hospitalized in Florida and is in critical condition, President Donald Trump said.

title: ICE Operation in Brooklyn Sparks Skirmishes and Complaints
title_cn: 布鲁克林 ICE 行动引发小冲突和投诉
summary: Federal immigration agents arrested a Nigerian national in Brooklyn late Saturday, setting off a confrontation with protesters outside a local hospital and sparking criticism from some New York City officials.

title: UK Set to Enter Talks to Join EU’s €90 Billion Ukraine Loan Plan
title_cn: 英国将就加入欧盟900亿欧元乌克兰贷款计划进行谈判
summary: The UK is set to enter talks to join the European Union’s €90 billion ($105 billion) Ukraine loan plan, underlining what the British government describes as “growing defense ties” between London and Brussels.

title: Mexico’s Ruling Morena Party Taps Montiel as New Leader
title_cn: 墨西哥执政党莫雷纳党任命蒙蒂尔为新领导人
summary: Mexico’s ruling political party has chosen a former member of President Claudia Sheinbaum’s cabinet as its new leader.

title: ECB’s Stournaras Sees Recession Concern, Phileleftheros Says
title_cn: 菲勒莱夫塞罗斯表示，欧洲央行行长斯托纳拉斯看到了经济衰退的担忧
summary: Concern about a possible euro-area recession is “real and justified” as conflict in the Middle East causes a supply-side disruption, European Central Bank Governing Council member Yannis Stournaras said in an interview with Phileleftheros.

title: Schumer Wants to Ban Lawmakers, Officials on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 舒默希望禁止立法者和官员参与预测市场
summary: Senate Democratic leader Chuck Schumer called on the House of Representatives and the White House to follow the Senate’s lead by imposing a ban on trading in fast-growing prediction markets.

title: Trump Casts Doubts on Iran Peace Proposal as Details Emerge
title_cn: 随着细节浮出水面，特朗普对伊朗和平提议表示怀疑
summary: Efforts continued to broker an end to the Iran war, now into its third month, as US President Donald Trump suggested the Islamic Republic’s latest peace proposal might not be enough to satisfy him.

title: Two US Service Members Go Missing During Exercise in Morocco
title_cn: 两名美国军人在摩洛哥演习期间失踪
summary: Two US Army service members went missing in Morocco during a training exercise, the US Africa Command said Sunday.

title: Rubio Plans Italy Visit After Trump’s Clashes With Meloni, Pope
title_cn: 特朗普与教皇梅洛尼发生冲突后卢比奥计划访问意大利
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to Rome later this week, according to people familiar with the matter, after Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump clashed over the Iran war and her defense of Pope Leo XIV.

title: Rep. Fields: We Need Term Limits on the Supreme Court
title_cn: 众议员菲尔兹：我们需要最高法院的任期限制
summary: The US Supreme Court sharply limited the use of the Voting Rights Act to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts in a major ruling that buttresses Republican efforts to keep control of the House in this year’s midterms and beyond. Rep. Cleo Fields (D-LA) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Says US Is ‘Suffocating’ Iran With Oil Industry Creaking
title_cn: 贝森特称美国正在通过石油工业的崩溃“窒息”伊朗
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US is “suffocating” Iran with economic and financial pressure, suggesting that the rulers in Tehran will eventually buckle.

title: Nigeria’s Obi Quits Opposition Coalition in a Boost for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚奥比退出反对派联盟，提振蒂努布
summary: One of Nigeria’s top opposition politicians has quit a coalition that planned to run against President Bola Tinubu in January 2027 elections, improving his chances of retaining power.

title: Control of US House Hinges on Historically Low Number of Seats
title_cn: 美国众议院的控制取决于历史上较低的席位数量
summary: A shrinking number of seats will determine control of the US House after both Republicans and Democrats spent much of the past year redrawing congressional maps to erase swing districts.

title: Massie Has Given a Voice to Sex Abuse Survivors
title_cn: 马西为性虐待幸存者发声
summary: By forcing the DOJ to release the Epstein files, Republican Representative Thomas Massie gave a voice to a constituency that’s bigger than anyone wants to admit, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Mary Ellen Klas says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentines Keep Cash Under Mattresses Even as Milei Pushes Bank Accounts
title_cn: 即使米莱推入银行账户，阿根廷人仍将现金放在床垫下
summary: You’d be surprised how damp and smelly dollar bills get, Alejandro Lamas says, when they’ve been squirreled away under a mattress for years. He’s gotten so many stacks of them from Argentines he’s sold used cars to over the years that he’s a bit of a connoisseur. Slip him a counterfeit and he knows at first touch.

title: Ukraine Says Russia’s Primorsk Oil Export Port Damaged in Attack
title_cn: 乌克兰称俄罗斯普里莫尔斯克石油出口港在袭击中受损
summary: Ukraine said it damaged Russia’s Primorsk port on the Baltic Sea, a key oil export hub, in a drone barrage that also targeted several vessels.
